reference: Hi. This can be either cancer or some inflammatory mass. A computed tomography scan or magnetic resonance imaging and fine needle aspiration cytology to start with should help to get a diagnosis. If this is cancer, you may need a laryngectomy. If it is inflammatory, simple repeated aspiration and broad-spectrum antibiotics should help to cure you. Always go for investigations before any surgery.
text: Hi. This can be either cancer or some inflammatory mask. A computed tomography scan or a magnetic resonance imaging and fine needle aspiration psychology to start with should help to get a diagnosis. If this is cancer, you may need a laryngectomy. If it is inflammatory, simple repeated aspiration and broad-spectrum antibiotics should help to cure you. Always go for investigations before any surgery.
